name: E-Z Bus Inc
entity_status: closed/dissolved (original E-Z Bus Inc at 1150 Jetport Dr listed CLOSED on Yellowpages); related successor 'EZ Bus Tours & Travel, LLC' / 'Harp Enterprises Corp' operates in Winter Springs FL (USDOT 1052984, MC-440119)
notes: Original E-Z Bus Inc at 1150 Jetport Dr, Orlando FL 32809 has no FMCSA match (likely intrastate-only or defunct after 2011 bankruptcy). Successor entity Harp Enterprises Corp dba EZ Bus Tours & Travel at 203 Blue Creek Dr / 5717 Red Bug Lake Rd, Winter Springs FL 32708 holds USDOT 1052984 (interstate, authorized passenger, 2 power units, 4 drivers, Satisfactory rating 09/02/2025). Luis Pineda is President of both entities. Treat as 'no USDOT for original entity (likely intrastate / closed)' but note interstate successor.

name: A & M Transit
entity_status: active (per business directory listings; not verified on Ohio SOS portal which blocks WebFetch)
registry_source: Ohio Secretary of State (businesssearch.ohiosos.gov) - direct access blocked; corroborated via Manta, Yellowpages, OhioBiz
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER returns no records for 'A & M Transit' or 'A M Transit' name variants. Confused with USDOT 347062 which is Iron City Trucking LLC (also at Youngstown OH but property carrier with different name). A & M Transit operates as local bus charter at 5614 South Ave, Youngstown OH 44512; phone (330) 781-8687; Ohio incorporated 2006; ~3 employees; ~$116K annual revenue. Likely intrastate-only Ohio charter bus operator below FMCSA interstate registration threshold.

name: Mercy Transportation
entity_status: closed (per Yellowpages listing marked CLOSED at 1876 N University Dr Ste 201p, Plantation FL 33322)
registry_source: Florida Sunbiz - direct search blocked (HTTP 403); no Plantation-based 'Mercy Transportation' entity surfaced via Sunbiz proxy or OpenCorporates
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate / now defunct). FMCSA SAFER MERCY TRANSPORT keyword search returned 7 carriers - none located in Plantation FL (closest FL hits are Mercy Transport Services Inc Miami USDOT 4012781, Mercy School Bus Hialeah USDOT 2065916 - now Juan C Rodriguez intrastate, and Mercy Trans LLC Plant City USDOT 3175898). Business directory confirms Mercy Transportation at 1876 N University Dr was a non-emergency / special-needs transport at Plantation FL but is now closed. No active FMCSA presence at the Plantation address.

name: Interntonal SCHL Bus Svc Isbs
entity_status: unknown - no Illinois SOS entity surfaced for 'International School Bus Service' or 'ISBS' at 3258 W 85th Pl Chicago
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State Business Services (apps.ilsos.gov) - not directly accessed; no online corroborating records found
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate / very small operator). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL BUS', 'ISBS', and variants return no matches. Cook County records show 3258 W 85th Pl/St (60652) as a residential single-family home (built 1955) - consistent with a home-based micro school bus operator. No web/corporate footprint surfaced beyond the original FMCSA list entry. Treat as defunct or home-based intrastate operator; not currently registered with FMCSA.

name: Eagle Bus Svc
entity_status: active (NC SOS Business Registration; OpenCorporates record us_nc/1287300; BBB accredited 07/25/2025)
registry_source: NC Secretary of State Business Registration (sosnc.gov) via OpenCorporates us_nc/1287300; BBB Charlotte profile
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate - Charlotte/Mecklenburg County NC school transport for charter & private schools, in-state only). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'EAGLE BUS', 'EAGLE BUS SERVICE', 'THE EAGLE BUS' return only out-of-state carriers (Eagle Bus Inc Waltham MA USDOT 2556441 is unrelated). Eagle Bus Service, Inc. incorporated in NC on 11/14/2012; locations: PO Box 425 Newell NC 28126, 7241 Covecreek Dr Charlotte NC 28215, 7027 Orr Rd Ste E Charlotte NC 28213; ~20 employees; serves Charlotte-area charter & private schools since 2009 (DBA started earlier). BBB A+ rating, accredited 07/25/2025. Strong tuck-in candidate but operates intrastate-only under NC pupil-transport rules.
